test_cases.title: Minimum viable workflow run
test_cases.description: Start a workflow via /workflow run command and verify it completes with 2 agent calls
steps: Verify result notification appears in conversation

test_cases.title: workflow-run tool returns _render descriptor
test_cases.description: AI calls workflow-run tool and result details contain correct _render field

test_cases.title: Pause running workflow
test_cases.description: Pause a running workflow via ctrl+p shortcut, verify state change
steps: Verify Worker thread terminated, callCache retained

test_cases.title: Resume paused workflow in same session
test_cases.description: Resume a paused workflow, verify completed agents are not re-executed
steps: Pause a workflow after 2 of 5 agent calls complete
Verify it continues from the 3rd agent call
Verify the first 2 calls are served from callCache (cached=true)

test_cases.title: Cross-session workflow recovery
test_cases.description: Close Pi session, restart, and recover a paused workflow

test_cases.title: Parallel agent execution
test_cases.description: Verify parallel() spawns concurrent subprocesses and gathers results
steps: Run workflow with await parallel([agent(A), agent(B), agent(C)])
Verify Worker receives all 3 results before continuing
Test with one call failing — verify error propagation

test_cases.title: Agent auto-retry on failure
test_cases.description: Verify 3 retries with exponential backoff, then fail
steps: Run workflow with an agent call that fails (invalid prompt/MCP)
Verify first failure triggers retry after ~1s
Verify node status becomes 'failed' after 3 failures

test_cases.title: Manual retry via shortcut
test_cases.description: User presses ctrl+r to retry a failed agent node
steps: Have a workflow with a failed node
Press ctrl+r to retry that node
Verify workflow continues if retry succeeds

test_cases.title: Multiple concurrent workflows
test_cases.description: Run 3 workflows simultaneously, verify independent execution
steps: Verify max 4 agent subprocesses at any time
Verify one completing does not affect others

test_cases.title: Token budget enforcement
test_cases.description: Verify budget_limited state when token limit reached
steps: Verify token usage accumulates per agent call
Verify workflow terminates with budget_limited at 100%

test_cases.title: Schema extraction from agent output
test_cases.description: Verify structured JSON extraction with schema validation
steps: Run agent with schema: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } }
Test with valid JSON output — verify parsed result
Test with invalid JSON output — verify raw text fallback

test_cases.title: Workflow list command
test_cases.description: Verify /workflow list shows available workflows from both directories
steps: Verify both workflows appear with name, description, phases

test_cases.title: Workflow with CC-compatible format
test_cases.description: Verify script with const meta = { name, description, phases } parses correctly
steps: Create workflow script with CC meta format
